title: Write a failing-then-passing 10-test async stress test
prompt: Write a stress test at `test/my_app/async_stress_test.exs` with 10 `test` cases that each: (1) generate a unique user email via `Ecto.UUID.generate/0`, (2) create the user, (3) assert the user is retrievable by that email. The module must be `async: true` and must NOT use `mode(:shared)`. All 10 tests must be able to run concurrently without collisions. Use dynamic test data generation.
tier_rationale: Requires producing 10 concurrency-safe tests with unique data — multi-test scaffold.
